description: In the WordPress admin panel, use the Site Editor to customize the 404 template and the Footer template part. Update the 404 template heading to exactly "Oops! We couldn't find that page." and include both a Search block and a Latest Posts block. In the Footer template part, add a paragraph block containing exactly "© 2026 My WordPress Blog. All rights reserved." Ensure these modifications are saved as Full Site Editor template overrides rather than standard pages.

metadata.expected_404_text: Oops! We couldn't find that page.
metadata.expected_footer_text: © 2026 My WordPress Blog. All rights reserved.
